column3: Person or organization who produces a work or publication by selecting and putting together material from the works of various persons or bodies.
Person or organization who gathers objects
Person or organization who registers the names of those who possess or own items in a collection.
Person or organization responsible for the restoration or preservation of materials
Person or organization responsible for the intellectual or artistic content of a work.
Person or organization placing material in the physical custody of a library or repository without transferring legal title.
Person or organization that has exclusive or shared marketing rights for a resource.
Person or organization who donates books
Person or organization who owned an item at some time in the past.
Person or organization that currently owns an item or collection.
Person or organization who sold an item to another owner.
